topic: locating decimals on a number line
latex: On the number line below, which point could represent $2.7$?
diagram_notes: A horizontal number line with arrows on both ends, showing integer tick marks at 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4. Four points are labeled: Point A is slightly to the right of 1 (approximately at 1.3), Point B is slightly to the left of 2 (approximately at 1.8), Point C is slightly to the right of 2 (approximately at 2.7), and Point D is slightly to the left of 4 (approximately at 3.8).
